metadata.name: Document Research
metadata.description: RAG-based document research and question answering using RAGResearchAgent
metadata.author: Kaizen Team

inputs.name: Research Query
inputs.description: Question to research in document collection
inputs.default: What are the key findings about climate change impacts?

inputs.name: Document Collection
inputs.description: Name or path to document collection

outputs.name: Confidence
outputs.description: Confidence in answer based on source quality

documentation.overview: This workflow performs document research using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). It searches a document collection for relevant information and generates accurate, citation-backed answers. Perfect for research tasks, knowledge base queries, and document analysis.
use_cases: Research paper analysis and literature review
Legal document research and case law lookup
Medical research and clinical guideline queries
prerequisites: OpenAI API key configured as OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable
Document collection indexed in vector database

example_inputs.query: What are the key findings about climate change impacts?
What are the best practices for microservices architecture?

example_outputs.answer: Key findings on climate change impacts include: 1) Global temperatures have risen 1.1°C since pre-industrial times, 2) Sea levels are rising at 3.3mm per year, 3) Extreme weather events are increasing in frequency and severity, and 4) Arctic ice is declining at 13% per decade. These findings are based on IPCC reports and peer-reviewed research.
